verificationNote: Domain structure based on ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A themes. Control names and descriptions are indicative paraphrases — not verbatim ISO text. Organizations should verify against the official ISO/IEC 27001:2022 standard.

organizational.name: Organizational Controls
organizational.description: Controls related to organizational policies, roles, responsibilities, and management processes for information security

people.name: People Controls
people.description: Controls related to individual people including screening, awareness, training, and disciplinary processes

physical.name: Physical Controls
physical.description: Controls related to physical security of premises, equipment, and supporting infrastructure

technological.name: Technological Controls
technological.description: Controls related to technology-based security measures including access control, cryptography, and secure development
